caption: In the video, a woman is giving a presentation in front of an audience. She is dressed in a black blazer over a white shirt and is holding a tablet in her hands. The background features a large projection screen displaying various images and text related to data and experience, including graphs, charts, and words like "data," "experience," and "work." The woman appears to be explaining or discussing the content on the screen, as she looks down at her tablet, possibly referencing notes or slides. A person wearing a green beanie is visible in the foreground, attentively watching the presentation. The setting suggests a professional or academic environment, likely a conference or seminar.
